---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is. What were you trying to do when it happened?

## OS & Environment
- **Operating System:** Windows 11 / macOS 14 / Linux (specify distro) / Other
- **JITCR Installation Date or Version:** [e.g., installed last week, or v1.0]
- **Claude Desktop Version:** [Check Help → About Claude Desktop]

## JITCR Setup
- **Filesystem MCP enabled?** Yes / No
- **Shell-command MCP enabled?** Yes / No
- **Git installed?** Yes / No
- **Project has git initialized?** Yes / No

## Steps to Reproduce
Tell us exactly how to trigger the bug:

1. I did this...
2. Then I did this...
3. Then I did this...
4. Bug happened here

## Expected Behavior
What should have happened instead?

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened? Include any error messages, unexpected output, or behavior.

## Error Message (if any)
If you got an error, paste the full error message here:

```
[paste full error]
```

## Additional Context
Anything else that might help us understand the bug?

- Is this a new project or existing one?
- Did this work before? If so, what changed?
- Any customizations to JITCR setup?
- Screenshots or code snippets that help show the issue?

---

## Notes
- Check [README.md](../README.md) to make sure this isn't expected behavior
- Search existing Issues in case someone reported this already
- The more detail you provide, the faster we can help
